title: AI Latency Phase 2 activation wiring (planned — awaiting Preview validation)
description: Wire the already-merged LAT-001 backends to their call sites. CURRENT REALITY (SC main ef618c6): OPERION_CRITIC_JSON = 0 call-sites; OPERION_EVENT_ENQUEUE = 0 call-sites; the entire app/lib/ai-due-index.ts module has 0 external callers → all three are fully INERT. Wiring touches critical AI-critic + durable-worker paths, so it is PLANNED (map-only) and must be Preview-validated. See docs/LAT-002-latency-activation-wiring-map.md.
rollbackSteps: Per flag: set OPERION_CRITIC_JSON / OPERION_EVENT_ENQUEUE / OPERION_DUE_INDEX* = OFF (instant, inert). Revert the (future) wiring PR.
exclusions: Due-index must NOT be promoted to the live read source without separate approval + passing dark-launch parity + backfill.
compatibilityNotes: Each flag OFF must preserve current behavior EXACTLY (parity tests required).
CRITIC_JSON: no duplicate provider call on confident jobs; borderline can still request the extra review.
EVENT_ENQUEUE: idempotent, no double execution, cron/manual recovery retained as safety net.
DUE_INDEX: dark-launch parity only; do not switch the live source this sprint.
Requires functional Preview AI Gateway to validate — currently blocked (see PREVIEW-AI-VALIDATION-CHECKLIST.md).

history.note: Verified against current main: all 3 latency flags inert (0 wired call-sites).
PLANNED — wiring map produced (docs/LAT-002-latency-activation-wiring-map.md); implementation deferred pending Preview AI validation (critical-path risk).
